allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; releases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r[''''tag_name''''], r[''''name''''], r[''''published_at''''][:10]\) for r in releases]")

Bash(node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on\(''''data'''',d=>chunks.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\(''''end'''',\(\)=>{ const data=JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''''''''\)\); data.forEach\(r=>console.log\(r.tag_name, r.name, r.published_at?.slice\(0,10\)\)\); }\)")
